title: Recipes Unlocked
description: This mod introduces crafting recipes for previously uncraftable items, including chainmail armor, saddles, name tags, various spawn eggs, and more!
body:
As the name suggests, this mod adds crafting recipes for items that cannot be crafted, like chainmail armour, saddle, name tag, various spawn eggs, balanced vanilla recipes, and much more!

All the Recipes have been uploaded to the Gallery, check it out!

Be sure to give suggestions in Discord and report issues (if any) on the issue tracker!

The latest version is v9, available for 1.21.X.
